block_00: Stock and crypto news of the week inside
block_03: Cryptocurrencies continue to come under pressure as investors digest the macro outlook. Selling pressure comes as Bitcoin (BTC-USD) remains around 50% below its all-time high in November 2021. The world's second-largest cryptocurrency, Ethereum, had fallen more than 9%, with one token price traded around $2,000.
block_07: Bayer AG had its target price boosted by Barclays from €85 to €90 in a Wednesday research. Barclays currently has an overweight rating on the stock. Meanwhile, Morgan Stanley increased their price target on Bayer AG from €77 to €83. Will these forecasts affect the stock price in a good way?
block_10: Apple had one of its worst days in recent memory, Wednesday, as the iPhone maker's shares fell more than 5%. The company was caught up in an ongoing tech selloff, due to uncertainty about the U.S. economy and rising inflation.
